title: The T-Birds Structure Collection
description: Adds several brand-new structures to the Vanilla Overworld!
body:
## The T-Birds Structure Collection
### A Worldgen Datapack from Team T-Birds!

This datapack adds several new structures into your world: primarily villages, but there are also a few secret, non-village structures in the mix as well. (Good luck finding them all!)

All structures fall under the `tbirds` namespace, for the purposes of the `/locate` and `/place` commands.

Read more on the [PlanetMinecraft Page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/thunderbirds-village-collection/)
